headline: Humanoid robot beats half-marathon world record set by Ugandan runner Jacob Kiplimo
summary: CNBC's Steve Sedgwick, Elaine Yu, and Arjun Kharpal discuss China's humanoid robotics industry — on full display at a marathon in Beijing — as well as the implications of these developments for the broader artificial intelligence market and supply chains.

headline: Apple’s China iPhone Surge Reshapes Growth And Margin Questions For Investors
summary: Apple, ticker NasdaqGS:AAPL, recorded a 20% year over year increase in iPhone shipments in China in Q1 2026. The broader Chinese smartphone market reportedly declined over the same period. Apple moved into the second spot by market share in China, behind Huawei. E commerce discounts, government subsidies, and Apple accepting lower margins supported this shipment growth. For you as an investor, this shift in China matters because iPhone remains the core revenue driver for NasdaqGS:AAPL and...

headline: Why FFLG Is the Best Fidelity ETF You’ve Never Heard Of
summary: FFLG has returned 44% over the past year, beating both the S&P 500 and Nasdaq 100 over the same stretch. That kind of outperformance from an actively managed fund with $521 million in assets would normally generate headlines. Instead, most growth investors default to passive index funds and never look twice at what Fidelity is ... Why FFLG Is the Best Fidelity ETF You’ve Never Heard Of
